name: Ylthari's Guardians
inspire:
After a friendly fighter uses a Core ability, you can place 1 Power card from your hand or the top card from your Power deck face down next to this warscroll, to a maximum of 3. These cards are no longer in your hand or Power deck and cannot be revealed.

At the end of your turn or after an enemy fighter is slain, you can place 1 growth token on each of those cards. After the fifth growth token is placed on the same card, pick a friendly fighter. Inspire that fighter, remove those growth tokens, and then add that card to your hand.

abilities.name: The Burgeoning
abilities.trigger: Use this immediately after your Action step.
abilities.flavorText: As trees blossom, Ylthari's Guardians surge forth with renewed vigour.
abilities.rulesText: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter X hexes, where X is the number of slain friendly fighters. If there are no slain friendly fighters, push that fighter 1 hex.

abilities.name: The Reaping
abilities.trigger: Use this immediately after you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack.
abilities.flavorText: The coming of midsummer sees the power of the Sylvaneth in full bloom, energetic and wild.
abilities.rulesText: That weapon has +X Attack dice for that Attack, where X is the number of slain friendly fighters. If there are no slain friendly fighters, that weapon has +1 Attack dice for that Attack.

abilities.name: The Dwindling
abilities.trigger: Use this immediately after your Action step.
abilities.flavorText: As the days grow shorter, the Sylvaneth are as capricious as the falling leaves.
abilities.rulesText: Pick a friendly fighter. Remove that fighter from the battlefield, and then place that fighter in an empty hex adjacent to a friendly fighter.

abilities.name: Everdusk
abilities.trigger: Use this immediately after you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack.
abilities.flavorText: The dearth of vital energies imbues Ylthari and her protectors with a bitterness of soul as cold as frost.
abilities.rulesText: That weapon has +X Damage for that Attack, where X is the number of slain friendly fighters.
